title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 526.130 - Notice, when not necessary
text:
526.130.  Notice, when not necessary. — When an injunction to stay proceedings is prayed in the same court where the proceedings were had, no notice of the application shall be necessary, unless prescribed by rules of court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1675) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1511; 1919 § 1961; 1909 § 2526
